message:
test(ingest): fix misleading test comment, add search_start snapping test

The extract_delta_small_overlap_mid_codepoint test comment incorrectly
claimed overlap_size=4 would slice at byte 4 inside the emoji, but
max_overlap is clamped by cur.len()=3 so search_start=7 (valid boundary).
Fixed the comment and added extract_delta_search_start_snaps_past_emoji
which genuinely lands search_start at byte 3 (inside a 4-byte emoji),
verifying the snapping logic advances to the next valid boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
